rulings.Case Title: CUONG THANH TRAN et al VS. HOME CREDIT LAW CENTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 3, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT HOME CREDIT LAW CENTER and BRIAN LINNEKENS's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. OVERRULED as to Linnekens, dba Home Credit Law Center. Complaint sufficiently alleges engagement of Home Credit Law Center for loan analysis and modification purposes. See SAC 8-9, Exs. A, B and C. Complaint also sufficiently alleges reasons for not naming allegedly non-existent entity as a defendant. Application of CCC 2945.1(b)(1) exception to transaction at issue is a question of fact. Fraud is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer is OVERRULED as to Linnekes, as individual, as to fraud cause of action; SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE to amend as to other causes of action to allege contract. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. PHILLIP LACY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 3, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT PHILLIP LACY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, not duplicative. New causes of action based on rent accrued after prior unlawful detainer. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TED HUANG VS. JOHN V. BUCKLEY III
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 3, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF TED HUANG's Motion For Attorneys Fees Granted, no opposition filed. Attorney's fees granted in the amount of $6,525. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 324 LARKIN STREET, LP VS. AYMAN SHEHADEH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 3, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT AYMAN SHEHADEH's Motion To Quash GRANTED with leave to amend to attach Lease. The motion is otherwise denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SPENCER, WILLIAM D., AS TRUSTEE OF THE WILLIAM D. et al VS. ALFONSO, SEAN A. INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA J&S et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 3, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MARK PAUL's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to Plaintiff to allege date of service of Notice. Even though, copies of envelopes are attached to the Complaint and incorporated by reference, the purported contents of those envelopes are not "unambiguous facts appearing in exhibits." = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SPENCER, WILLIAM D., AS TRUSTEE OF THE WILLIAM D. et al VS. ALFONSO, SEAN A. INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA J&S et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, June 3, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT MARK PAUL's Motion To Strike GRANTED with leave to amend as to requested statutory damages to allege specific facts supporting such claim. (14). Moot otherwise. See Stipulation filed on May 28, 2013. = (501/REQ)
